creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
sunpoet     2010-12-04 18:01:26 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    multimedia/ffmpegthumbnailer Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                 pkg-plist 
  Log:
  - Update to 2.0.4
  - Sort PLIST
  
  Changes:
  
  2.0.3:
  - Writing to stdout is now supported
  - Support for gnome-vfs uris added. New configure flag (--enable-gnome-vfs),
    this puts a runtime dependancy on libgnome-vfs-2.0
  
  2.0.4:
  - Fixed undefined references when compiling with certain LDFLAGS
  
  PR:             ports/152373
  Submitted by:   Marcus Hermansson <bmhermansson@gmail.com>
  Approved by:    maintainer (timeout, 16 days)
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.11      +8 -7      ports/multimedia/ffmpegthumbnailer/Makefile
  1.5       +2 -3      ports/multimedia/ffmpegthumbnailer/distinfo
  1.2       +1 -1      ports/multimedia/ffmpegthumbnailer/pkg-descr
  1.4       +4 -5      ports/multimedia/ffmpegthumbnailer/pkg-plist
